CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-03-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Tomar Mason, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

Kristin Kerr, Esq. appeared for and with the plaintiff(s) David Larkin, was sworn and direct examined.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) Martinez Construction, Juan Carlos Martinez, Parvin Sedigh Farasati and Barbara Bicknell for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $62,438.59
Attorney's Fees - $33,614.00
Costs - $1,499.55
Total judgment in the amount of $97,552.14

Off Calendar Oct-27-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. KRISTIN KERR OF THE LAW OFFICES OF GEORGE WOLFF, TEL. NO. 788-1881 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JOHN P. BABA OF THE WIEGEL LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. 552-8230, MOVING PARTY.

RULING - A R G U E D; MAYE TOM, AS TRUSTEE OF THE MICHAEL J DOOLEY TRUST DATED SEPT 19, 2001 AND AS TRUSTEE OF THE MAYE TOM FAMILY TRUST DATED APR 26, 1999, STEPHEN TOM, MARK TOM'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO INTERVENE IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Nichole Rodich, CSR # 11604

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-25-2011 Continued To Nov-03-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Tomar Mason, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

Kristin Kerr, Esq. appeared for and with the Plaintiff(s) David Larkin.

John Baba, Esq. for Interveenors Maye Tome as Trustee of the Michael J. Dooley Trust.
Ex parte application for leave to intervene in action was filed on 10-24-11 and noticed for Dept. 514 @ 9:00 a.m., copy of the filed motion was presented to the court at the hearing. After hearing and argument were made by counsel, The Ex parte application for leave to intervene was transferred to Dept. 302 and to be heard by Judge Khan today.
The Default Prove-Up hearing is continued to Nov. 3, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 514 pending the hearing and order from Dept. 302.

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-04-2011 Continued To Oct-25-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
